samples.xml_description:
<module id="edge_detect">
    <description>Implement a module for edge detection.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="a">Input signal.</input>
        <output id="rise">Output signal indicating a rising edge.</output>
        <output id="down">Output signal indicating a falling edge.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <enum id="state" width_description="[1:0]">
            <enum-value id="ZERO" description="State ZERO">0</enum-value>
            <enum-value id="ONE" description="State ONE">1</enum-value>
        </enum>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[1:0]">
            <reg-value id="state">State.</reg-value>
        </reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" width_description="[1:0]">
            <reg-value id="next_state">Next state.</reg-value>
        </reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential>
            <if id="reset_condition">
                <true>
                    <sequential>
                        <assign id="state" value="ZERO"/>
                    </sequential>
                </true>
                <false>
                    <sequential>
                        <assign id="state" value="next_state"/>
                    </sequential>
                </false>
            </if>
        </sequential>
        <sequential>
            <case id="state_cases" width_description="[1:0]">
                <case-item id="ZERO">
                    <true>
                        <if id="a_is_one">
                            <true>
                                <sequential>
                                    <assign id="next_state" value="ONE"/>
                                    <assign id="rise" value="1"/>
                                    <assign id="down" value="0"/>
                                </sequential>
                            </true>
                            <false>
                                <sequential>
                                    <assign id="next_state" value="ZERO"/>
                                    <assign id="rise" value="0"/>
                                    <assign id="down" value="0"/>
                                </sequential>
                            </false>
                        </if>
                    </true>
                    <false>
                        <sequential>
                            <assign id="next_state" value="ZERO"/>
                            <assign id="rise" value="0"/>
                            <assign id="down" value="0"/>
                        </sequential>
                    </false>
                </case-item>
                <case-item id="ONE">
                    <true>
                        <if id="a_is_zero">
                            <true>
                                <sequential>
                                    <assign id="next_state" value="ZERO"/>
                                    <assign id="rise" value="0"/>
                                    <assign id="down" value="1"/>
                                </sequential>
                            </true>
                            <false>
                                <sequential>
                                    <assign id="next_state" value="ONE"/>
                                    <assign id="rise" value="0"/>
                                    <assign id="down" value="0"/>
                                </sequential>
                            </false>
                        </if>
                    </true>
                    <false>
                        <sequential>
                            <assign id="next_state" value="ONE"/>
                            <assign id="rise" value="0"/>
                            <assign id="down" value="0"/>
                        </sequential>
                    </false>
                </case-item>
            </case>
        </sequential>
    </implementation>
</module>
